# Subtex

> Subtex is a digital business card and professional networking iOS app. It replaces physical business cards with QR-code profile exchange, AI-powered connection summaries, and private notes — so professionals never lose the context behind a handshake.

## What Subtex Does

Subtex solves the problem of forgetting the context behind professional connections. After meeting someone at a conference, event, or meeting, users exchange profiles via QR code, add private notes, and receive AI-generated summaries that surface the most important things to remember. For teams and organizations, Subtex provides an enterprise admin portal to run events at scale, manage attendees, and generate org-wide network insights.

## Key Features

- Instant QR-code profile exchange (no app required for the recipient to share)
- Private notes with no character limit (Subtex One)
- AI summaries of connections on demand (Subtex One)
- Unlimited profiles and card collection (Subtex One)
- Personal event insights
- Teams + Organizations admin portal
- Event creation, attendee invitations, and check-in management
- Admin-managed attendee and meeting briefs
- Org-level usage reporting and network intelligence
- Enterprise-grade controls

## Use Cases

- **Conferences & Trade Shows:** Exchange profiles instantly at the booth or in the hallway; AI summaries remind you who you met and why it mattered when you follow up.
- **Corporate Networking Events:** Teams use Subtex Organizations to manage attendee lists, send invitations, run check-in, and generate post-event connection reports.
- **Sales Teams:** Reps collect contacts at events, add private context notes, and surface insights that help prioritize follow-up.
- **Job Seekers & Recruiters:** Keep track of every person met at a career fair or industry meetup, with notes and AI-generated summaries to recall key details during follow-up.
- **Professional Associations:** Run member events with attendee management and generate org-level networking insights.
- **Small Business Owners:** Replace printed business cards with a digital profile that always stays current.

## How It Works

1. **Create your profile** — Set up one or more professional profiles in the app with your contact information, role, and links.
2. **Scan a QR code** — At a meeting or event, scan the other person's Subtex QR code (or they scan yours) to instantly exchange profiles.
3. **Add notes** — Jot down private notes immediately after meeting someone: what you discussed, context, follow-up actions.
4. **Get AI summaries** — On demand, Subtex generates an AI summary of your connection based on profile data and your notes.
5. **Review insights** — Over time, see patterns in your network through personal event insights.

## Pricing

- **Subtex (Free):** $0 — 1 profile, up to 50 cards, QR exchange
- **Subtex One (Individual):** $9.99/month or discounted annually — unlimited profiles, unlimited cards, AI summaries, event insights, priority support
- **Connect (Teams):** $1,199/year — 12 events/year, 500-person attendee pool, 100 member seats, admin portal
- **Engage (Teams):** $3,199/year — 36 events/year, 2,000-person attendee pool, 500 member seats, admin portal
- **Influence (Enterprise):** $7,999/year — 100 events/year, 10,000-person attendee pool, 2,000 member seats, admin portal, dedicated support

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is Subtex?**
Subtex is a digital business card and professional networking app for iOS. It lets users exchange contact profiles via QR code, take private notes on connections, and receive AI-generated summaries to remember the context behind every meeting.

**How is Subtex different from a regular digital business card app?**
Most digital business card apps stop at contact exchange. Subtex adds private notes, AI-powered connection summaries, personal event insights, and an enterprise-grade admin portal for teams running events at scale.

**Does the other person need to have the Subtex app?**
No. Recipients can share their profile without downloading the app. Full features (notes, AI summaries) are available to Subtex users.

**Is Subtex available on Android?**
Subtex is currently available for iOS. Android support is on the roadmap.

**What AI features does Subtex offer?**
Subtex One subscribers can generate AI summaries of any connection on demand. The AI analyzes profile data and private notes to surface the most important context about each person.

**What is the Subtex admin portal?**
The dashboard at dashboard.getsubtex.com is a web-based admin portal for Teams and Organizations plan subscribers. Admins can create events, invite attendees, manage check-in, issue meeting briefs, and view org-wide network intelligence reports.

**Is my data private?**
Notes are private — they are never shared with the other person. Subtex collects only the information you explicitly add to your profile. See the Privacy Policy at https://getsubtex.com/privacy.html.

**How do I get started?**
Download Subtex from the App Store (free), create your profile, and start exchanging QR codes. No credit card required to start.

## Competitors & Alternatives

Subtex competes in the digital business card and professional networking space. Common alternatives include:
- HiHello — digital business card app, no AI summaries or event management
- Blinq — digital business card, limited notes, no enterprise event tools
- Popl — NFC and QR-based card sharing, less focus on connection context
- LinkedIn QR codes — contact exchange only, no notes or AI summaries
- Paper business cards — no notes, no AI, easily lost

Subtex's differentiator is the combination of QR exchange + private notes + AI summaries + enterprise event management in a single product.

GetSubtex LLC — Massachusetts, USA
